title: DreamBuilders
description: DreamBuilders is the ultimate building modpack that adds furniture tools and creative utilities to make construction faster easier and more beautiful
body:
# 🌌 DreamBuilders
🏗️ The Best Modpack for Builders in Minecraft!

DreamBuilders is a modpack created especially for those who love building.
It contains many useful mods for furniture, objects, and advanced construction tools.
With this pack, you can create beautiful houses, castles, and even whole cities!

## ✨ Main Features

🪑 Furniture mods – decorate your interiors with style

🛠️ Axiom – advanced object editing tool

🏰 Construction utilities – more blocks, shapes, and possibilities

### 📦 Included Mods

Banner Flags

Enchanted Vertical Slabs

Filament

Laser Bridges & Doors

Macaw's Bridges

These mods will greatly improve your building experience and make it easier to create stunning structures.

## 🎮 Gameplay

⚠️ Important: This modpack is not designed for survival.
It is created for Creative Mode only.

So relax, have fun, and unleash your creativity with DreamBuilders!
